summary: Full backend + frontend validation of GAIA Earth-Calendar Astrology mobile app. All 5 pytest backend tests pass (health, daily, reading EN, reading FR, variation between births). Frontend flows verified on 420x900 mobile viewport: home → language toggle (EN ↔ FR) → chart form → valid date → result page with correct sign ('The Threshold of Light' for June 21) → 5-element wheel → all metadata rows → AI deep reading generation (~30s) producing rich 4-6 paragraph Claude Sonnet 4.5 prose. /signs, /sign/[id], /elements, /element/[id], /houses, /about all render in both languages. No blockers, no red-screen errors.

ui_bugs.issue: SPIRIT label is horizontally clipped at the left edge of the SVG (renders as 'PIRIT'). Label anchoring or svg padding should be widened so the left-side text is not cut by the viewBox.

Missing testIDs expected by integration hand-off note: cta-explore, daily-card, quick-link-signs, quick-link-elements, quick-link-houses, quick-link-about. CTA-generate-chart and language-toggle DO exist. Add the rest for consistency and future automation.
Hemisphere pill buttons 'North' / 'South' render and are functional but are missing data-testid='hemisphere-N' and 'hemisphere-S' (note referenced them). Add testIDs.
Deep reading text renders correctly after Generate Deep Reading, but the paragraphs container lacks data-testid='deep-reading-text'. Add a testID on the rendered <Text> block for easier automation.

issues: Left-side SPIRIT label clipped by SVG bounds on 420px viewport

action_items: Add missing testIDs: cta-explore, daily-card, quick-link-signs|elements|houses|about, hemisphere-N, hemisphere-S, deep-reading-text (all LOW priority, functionality works without them).
Fix SPIRIT label clipping in ElementWheel (left-anchor text or widen SVG viewBox / padding).
Optional: surface the hemisphere-N/S selection state via aria-pressed or data-selected for easier test assertions.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean, well-structured (~245 lines), uses async correctly, pydantic validation, EMERGENT_LLM_KEY read from env, no Mongo _id leakage (no Mongo used).
Proper HTTP 500 with message on LLM failure via HTTPException.
Consider validating birth_date format in ChartPayload with a validator (currently accepts any str).
CORS is wide-open ('*'); acceptable for a public read-only content API but noting it.
seed_data_creation: None — app has no persistence by design.
context_for_next_testing_agent: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL = https://chrono-social-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_gaia_api.py run in ~108s (dominated by 3 Claude Sonnet 4.5 calls at ~25-35s each). If retesting, set pytest timeout >= 120s per reading test. Frontend tested at viewport 420x900. Use testIDs: language-toggle, cta-generate-chart, input-year/month/day, input-place, submit-chart, sign-card-<id>, element-card-<id>, generate-deep-reading.
rca_of_issue: No unresolved issues. SPIRIT label clipping RCA: the ElementWheel SVG places label text using its natural anchor; when the SPIRIT node sits at the far-left polar coordinate, the text extends outside the SVG viewBox. Fix: set textAnchor='start' for right-side nodes, 'end' for left-side nodes (or 'middle' with enough horizontal padding in the viewBox).
